description: This Java source file defines a Spring Boot REST controller named SystemController that provides basic system endpoints such as root greeting, documentation redirection, health check, and application info.

classes.name: SystemController
classes.description: A Spring REST controller that provides basic system endpoints such as health check, documentation redirection, welcome message, and application info.

methods.name: hello
methods.description: Returns a welcome message indicating the API is running.

methods.name: docs
methods.description: Redirects to Swagger UI while preserving the proxy prefix and request scheme/host/port.

methods.name: health
methods.description: Returns 'OK' as a health status indicator.

methods.name: info
methods.description: Returns basic information about the Spring Boot application.
